brand.tagline: Control the edge. Protect every domain.
brand.description: Self-hosted multi-domain anti-DDoS, anti-bot, and reverse proxy management for Ubuntu VPS.

feature.multiDomain: Route and protect multiple domains from one VPS.
feature.challenge: Cookie and JavaScript challenge flows for suspicious traffic.
feature.stats: Operational charts, logs, and attack insights in one panel.

messages.partialData: Some data could not be loaded. Showing safe defaults.
messages.statsUnavailable: Statistics are unavailable right now. Filters and safe defaults are still shown.
messages.domainPartial: Some domain details could not be loaded. Showing available data only.

login.title: Admin Login
login.subtitle: Use your ShieldPanel credentials to manage protected domains.

dashboard.reasonBreakdown: Reason distribution based on recent requests.

domains.title: Domains
domains.subtitle: Manage origins, SSL, challenge modes, and per-domain rules.
domains.domainExists: This domain already exists. Edit the existing record instead.

statistics.chartDescription: Traffic trend for the selected filters and time range.
statistics.reasonBreakdown: Breakdown of recent block and challenge reasons.
statistics.filtersDescription: Narrow traffic data by domain, decision, and reason.

ipControl.title: IP Control
ipControl.subtitle: Manage global blacklists, whitelists, and active temporary bans.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Tune panel language, session defaults, and trusted proxy behavior.

users.title: Admin Users
users.subtitle: Create and maintain panel users and roles.

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.subtitle: Review admin actions, changes, and sign-in events.
